title: Endpoint SRAM/NoC constrained Llama7B attention schedule
hypothesis: Applying practical SRAM-bank service, local tile-buffer capacity, and endpoint injection/ejection caps to the endpoint-measured topology-derived Llama7B dense-tile schedule will quantify the next on-chip service bottleneck without changing HBM/DRAM assumptions.

direct_comparison.primary_question: How does the endpoint-measured Llama7B topology-derived dense-tile schedule move after practical SRAM-bank and endpoint service caps are applied?
include: Use the endpoint topology-derived schedule merged from l2_decoder_attention_kv_dense_tile_endpoint_topology_derived_schedule_llama7b_v1_r3.
Use the measured SRAM tile-buffer profile l2_decoder_attention_sram_profile_v1.
Sweep practical endpoint port width/count, endpoint efficiency, SRAM bank efficiency, and local buffer multiplier.
Report slowdown versus the endpoint topology-derived schedule and the limiting cap source.
exclude: Do not change HBM/DRAM bandwidth, frequency, or service policy.
Do not introduce new KV sharing or precision/quality changes.
Do not run new physical closure in this L2 scheduler item.
Do not reintroduce independent abstract NoC bandwidth or hop sweeps.
follow_on_broad_sweep: If endpoint or SRAM-bank service dominates, promote a detailed SRAM/endpoint arbitration model for the best topology family.
After on-chip service is consistent, revisit HBM/DRAM only as a separate scoped item.

expected_benefit: Close the remaining optimistic SRAM-bank bandwidth assumption on the endpoint-measured schedule.
Identify whether topology aggregate service, endpoint injection/ejection, or SRAM-bank read service is the immediate limiter.
Provide a better frontier input for the next detailed NoC/SRAM scheduler model.
risks: This remains analytic service-envelope evidence, not cycle-accurate SRAM arbitration.
The estimator retains frontier rows from the topology-derived schedule rather than fully re-searching all 746k topology-derived rows.
Endpoint caps are parametric until endpoint queues and arbitration are embodied in RTL.

expected_result.reason: The result should report endpoint topology-derived slowdown and identify the practical cap source for retained Llama7B dense-tile frontier rows.
